palette_hint: Background #F4F1EC (warm ivory), body text #1A1A2E (near-black navy), primary accent #2E5D9E (steel blue), secondary accent #C8A951 (antique gold) for CTAs and focus rings.
type_style: Headings in Georgia serif bold for gravitas, body and labels in system-ui at 14px regular, monospace (Courier New) for account numbers and numeric fields, tight letter-spacing on uppercase labels.
description: Vaultline is a fictional boutique private-banking onboarding portal where high-net-worth applicants select an account tier, enter personal and financial data across five precision-form pages, and submit a complete application package.
constraints: All form pages share a centered content column of max-width 720px with 48px horizontal padding and a persistent 5-step progress indicator at the top (step numbers + labels, active step highlighted in #2E5D9E, completed steps in #C8A951).

Every <input>, <select>, and <textarea> has border: 1.5px solid #C2BAA8, border-radius: 3px, padding: 10px 12px, and transitions to border-color #2E5D9E with a 2px outline in rgba(46,93,158,0.25) on :focus.
Invalid required fields show border-color #B94040 and a small red label below using :invalid + adjacent sibling CSS only — no JavaScript.

Custom radio buttons (account type page) and checkboxes (documents consent page) use hidden <input> plus a styled <span> sibling: 18px square, border 2px solid #C2BAA8, checked state filled #2E5D9E with a white center mark via CSS content.

The review-submit page renders a summary table with zebra striping (#F4F1EC / #EDEAE2 alternating rows), right-aligned monospace numeric cells for balances and reference numbers, and a sticky header row in #1A1A2E text on #E3DDD1 background.

page_specs.account-type: Displays three account tier cards in a single-column stack — Foundations (min. $250,000), Reserve ($1,000,000), and Apex ($5,000,000+) — each card containing a title, bullet list of three features, and a large custom radio button. Selected card gains a left border of 3px solid #2E5D9E and a background tint of #EBF0F8. A gold 'Continue' button (background #C8A951, text #1A1A2E, 48px tall, full column width) anchors the bottom of the page.
page_specs.personal-details: A two-column form grid (gap: 24px) collects full legal name, date of birth, nationality (dropdown of 30 countries), dual citizenship toggle (yes/no radios), residential address in four fields spanning full width, and a phone number field with a country-code select prefix. All labels are uppercase 11px tracked in #6B6358. A 'Save & Continue' button matches the gold CTA style from page one.
page_specs.financial-profile: Single-column layout with a dense set of financial fields: annual income range (6-option select), source of wealth (multi-select checkboxes for employment, inheritance, investments, business sale, other), estimated net worth (text input formatted as currency with monospace font), primary investment objective (4 radio options: capital preservation, income, balanced growth, aggressive growth), and a 160px-tall <textarea> for additional notes. Field groups are separated by a 1px #C2BAA8 horizontal rule with a small section heading in Georgia bold.
page_specs.documents: Presents a checklist of five required documents (government-issued ID, proof of address, source-of-funds letter, tax identification, signed terms PDF) each as a styled row with a custom checkbox, document name, accepted-format note in #6B6358, and a file-name text input (no actual upload, just filename entry). Below the checklist, a consent block contains three additional checkboxes for data processing, marketing communications, and electronic signature agreement, with inline link text styled in #2E5D9E underline.
page_specs.review-submit: A read-only summary page with three zebra-striped tables: Personal Information (name, DOB, nationality, address), Financial Profile (income range, net worth, objective), and Documents Submitted (filename per document type). Numeric and reference cells are right-aligned in Courier New 13px. A editable reference code field (pre-filled 'VL-2024-XXXX' pattern) sits above a two-button row: 'Back to Edit' (outline style, border #2E5D9E, text #2E5D9E) and 'Submit Application' (solid #2E5D9E background, white text, 48px tall, 200px wide) aligned right.
